name: wxcode-admin-meridian-people
title: Meridian Admin
description: Warm-professional light-mode admin aesthetic: off-white canvas (#f8f8fb), indigo accent (#4f46e5), white sidebar and cards with hairline borders and soft shadows, Inter type, 12px card radii, 11px uppercase micro-labels, and multi-tone status pills. Archetype = 240px fixed sidebar (entity-switcher card + grouped nav sections + footer user row) + 60px topbar (title/breadcrumb + search + period tabs + bell + avatar) + 4 KPI tiles (figure + delta chip + sparkline) + 2-column grid (area-chart card + horizontal-bar breakdown card) + full-width avatar-records table + 320px side-panel (queued-approvals list), plus matching list, form, and detail screens.

query.en: Apply this warm light-mode indigo-accent admin aesthetic to my domain — fixed sidebar with entity-switcher and grouped nav, topbar with search and period selector, 4 KPI tiles with sparklines, an area-chart card and a horizontal-bar breakdown card, a full-width avatar records table with status pills, and a queued-approvals side panel, plus list, form, and detail screens.
query.zh-CN: 将这个温暖专业的浅色调靛蓝强调色管理界面应用到我的领域：固定侧栏含实体切换和分组导航、顶栏含搜索和周期选择器、4 个带迷你图的 KPI 卡片、面积图卡片和水平条形分组卡片、带状态标签的头像记录表格，以及待批准事项侧边栏，并配套列表、表单和详情页面。

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
